title: Add Ripple Effect Stories, Love Notes, Deed of the Day, Kindness Matches & Memory Jars

requirements.text: Add backend support for Ripple Effect Stories: allow a post to optionally reference a parent post ID as its 'inspiration source', store a ripple chain map (parentPostId → [childPostIds]), and expose query functions to fetch the full ripple chain for any given post.

quotes: chain of kindness linking inspired deeds back to originating deed

acceptanceCriteria: Posts can be created with an optional inspirationSource post ID
A ripple chain query returns all deeds linked back to an originating post in order
Chain depth of at least 5 levels is supported

requirements.text: Build a Ripple Effect Stories UI: on each PostCard, show a 'This inspired me' button that opens a ripple post creation modal pre-linked to the parent deed. Display the ripple chain as a visual tree/timeline beneath the original post, showing how kindness spread from one deed to many.

quotes: creating a visible chain of kindness
People love seeing the impact they started

acceptanceCriteria: Each post card shows a 'This inspired me ✨' button
Tapping it opens a create-post modal with the parent deed linked
Ripple chain view shows the originating deed and all descendant deeds in a tree or timeline layout
Chain displays author avatars, captions, and timestamps

requirements.text: Add backend support for Love Notes to Strangers: store anonymous positivity notes with a message body (max 280 chars), a timestamp, and a recipient principal chosen randomly from active users. Expose functions to send a note and fetch notes addressed to the calling user.

quotes: anonymous positivity board where users can send short, uplifting messages to random people

acceptanceCriteria: A note is stored with anonymous sender, random recipient, message, and timestamp
Users can retrieve all notes sent to them
Sender identity is never exposed in any query result

requirements.text: Build a Love Notes to Strangers page accessible from the main navigation: show a warm, romantic card UI where authenticated users can type and send an anonymous note. Display received notes in a scrollable inbox styled like sealed letter envelopes that open on click, revealing the message with a soft animation.

quotes: giving and receiving warmth without pressure
Perfect for romantics and lonely hearts

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes a 'Love Notes' link
Send form has a 280-character textarea and a 'Send to a Stranger 💌' button
Received notes appear as envelope cards; clicking one animates it open to reveal the message
Sender is shown only as 'A Kind Stranger'
Empty state shows an encouraging message when no notes have been received

requirements.text: Add backend support for Deed of the Day Challenges: store a single daily challenge prompt (text, date, category) set by admins or auto-rotated from a curated list. Store user challenge completions linking a user principal, date, and their completion post ID. Expose query functions to get today's challenge and all completions for it.

quotes: A daily prompt the whole community does together

acceptanceCriteria: One active challenge prompt exists per calendar day
Users can mark a challenge as completed by linking a post
Query returns today's challenge and a list of all completions with user info

requirements.text: Build a Deed of the Day Challenge page: display today's challenge prompt in a large, celebratory hero card with a countdown to the next day's challenge. Show a 'Accept & Complete' button that opens the post creation modal pre-filled with the challenge context. Below the hero, render a live community wall of everyone who has completed today's challenge with their deed posts, participant count, and a progress ring.

quotes: Creates shared moments and conversation — the antidote to loneliness

acceptanceCriteria: Hero card shows today's challenge text, category, and a live countdown timer to midnight
Participant count and progress ring update in real time via React Query polling
Community wall shows completion posts with author avatars and captions
Completed users see a 'You did it today! 🌟' badge instead of the accept button

requirements.text: Add backend support for Kindness Matches: compute compatibility scores between users based on overlapping deed categories in their posts. Store match pairs with a score and a 'reason' text (e.g., 'You both love helping neighbours'). Expose a query for a user to retrieve their top 5 Kindness Matches.

quotes: algorithm that pairs two users who have done similar deeds
friendship matchmaker based on character, not looks

acceptanceCriteria: Match scores are computed from shared post categories between two users
Each match record includes a human-readable reason string
Top 5 matches are returned sorted by score descending
A user is never matched with themselves

requirements.text: Build a Kindness Matches page: display the current user's top 5 matched users as profile cards with a compatibility percentage, shared deed categories, and the reason they were matched. Include a 'Say Hello 👋' button on each card that initiates a message to that user. Style the page with a warm, heart-themed romantic aesthetic.

quotes: like a friendship matchmaker based on character, not looks

acceptanceCriteria: Page shows up to 5 match cards with avatar, name, compatibility percentage, shared categories, and match reason
'Say Hello 👋' button opens the Messages component pre-addressed to that user
Cards animate in with a gentle fade/slide entrance
Empty state encourages the user to post more deeds to find matches

requirements.text: Add backend support for Memory Jars: allow users to save any post into their personal Memory Jar collection, store saved post references (postId, savedAt timestamp) per user, and expose query functions to add/remove a post from a jar and to fetch all jar contents for the calling user.

quotes: Users collect their favorite deeds from others into a personal jar they can revisit anytime
like a scrapbook of human goodness

acceptanceCriteria: Users can save and unsave any post to their Memory Jar
Jar contents are returned with full post data sorted by savedAt descending
Duplicate saves are idempotent (no duplicates stored)

requirements.text: Build a Memory Jar UI: add a mason-jar bookmark icon to every PostCard that fills/animates when a post is saved. Create a dedicated Memory Jar profile section (accessible from the Profile page) displaying all saved posts in a cozy scrapbook grid layout with a vintage paper/warmth aesthetic. Show a count badge on the jar icon in the profile nav.

quotes: personal jar they can revisit anytime

acceptanceCriteria: Every post card has a jar/bookmark icon that toggles saved state with a fill animation
Memory Jar tab on the Profile page displays all saved posts in a warm scrapbook grid
Jar count badge on the profile nav updates reactively
Empty jar state shows an illustrated message inviting users to save their first deed
Removing a post from the jar is supported via an unsave button on the scrapbook cards

requirements.text: Update the main navigation (Header component) to include links to all five new features: Love Notes, Deed of the Day, Kindness Matches, and Memory Jar (Memory Jar also accessible from Profile). Ensure all new pages are registered as routes in App.tsx.

quotes: Build all of them into deeds right now

acceptanceCriteria: Header dropdown or nav bar includes links to Love Notes, Deed of the Day, and Kindness Matches
All new pages resolve correctly via the router without 404s
Active route is visually highlighted in the nav

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
Do not edit any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Sender identity must never be exposed in Love Notes queries — anonymity is a hard requirement
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket-based live updates (polling via React Query is acceptable)
AI or ML-based matching algorithms — category overlap scoring is sufficient
Admin UI for managing Deed of the Day prompts in this iteration
Email or push notifications for new Love Notes or Kindness Matches

required: Warm glowing mason jar illustration with golden light and small floating hearts, for Memory Jar feature (memory-jar-icon.dim_256x256.png)
Sealed wax-stamped envelope with a small heart, soft warm tones, for Love Notes feature (love-note-envelope.dim_256x256.png)
Ripple of golden rings on a calm water surface symbolising chain of kindness, for Ripple Effect Stories (ripple-effect-hero.dim_800x400.png)
Two hands reaching toward each other with soft pastel glow, for Kindness Matches feature (kindness-match-hero.dim_800x400.png)
Sun rising over a community of silhouettes holding hands, warm coral and gold tones, for Deed of the Day (deed-of-the-day-hero.dim_800x400.png)
